query:
INSERT INTO learning_path_courses (pathId, courseId, orderIndex)
SELECT 3, c.id, 
  CASE c.title
    WHEN 'Systematic Theology' THEN 1
    WHEN 'Old Testament Survey' THEN 2
    WHEN 'New Testament Survey' THEN 3
    WHEN 'Deliverance Ministry' THEN 4
    WHEN 'Understanding Prophecy' THEN 5
  END
FROM courses c
WHERE c.title IN ('Systematic Theology', 'Old Testament Survey', 'New Testament Survey', 'Deliverance Ministry', 'Understanding Prophecy')
